channel.title: League of Legends Dev News
channel.description: Latest developer updates and diaries from the League of Legends team.

item.title: Dev2026-05-27T20:00:00.000Z/dev: The Return of Ranked 5sWe’re experimenting with a new Ranked queue.
item.description: Dev2026-05-27T20:00:00.000Z/dev: The Return of Ranked 5sWe’re experimenting with a new Ranked queue.

item.title: Dev2026-05-27T20:00:00.000ZDev Update: Mayhem, Ranked 5s & MorePabro, Meddler, Phlox, and Cadmus talk about ARAM: Mayhem, Ranked 5s, skins, MSI, and more.
item.description: Dev2026-05-27T20:00:00.000ZDev Update: Mayhem, Ranked 5s & MorePabro, Meddler, Phlox, and Cadmus talk about ARAM: Mayhem, Ranked 5s, skins, MSI, and more.

item.title: Dev2026-05-27T20:00:00.000Z/dev: Augmentmaxxing ARAM: MayhemMore Mayhem ensues starting in 26.12!
item.description: Dev2026-05-27T20:00:00.000Z/dev: Augmentmaxxing ARAM: MayhemMore Mayhem ensues starting in 26.12!

item.title: Dev2026-05-27T20:00:00.000ZTL;DW: Mayhem, Ranked 5s & More Dev UpdateA short rundown of changes from today’s Dev Update.
item.description: Dev2026-05-27T20:00:00.000ZTL;DW: Mayhem, Ranked 5s & More Dev UpdateA short rundown of changes from today’s Dev Update.

item.title: Dev2026-04-21T15:00:00.000Z/dev: Apex Tier Ranked ResetWhy we’re doing a Ranked reset for Master+ in NA, EUW, EUNE, BR, LAN, and TR in 26.9.
item.description: Dev2026-04-21T15:00:00.000Z/dev: Apex Tier Ranked ResetWhy we’re doing a Ranked reset for Master+ in NA, EUW, EUNE, BR, LAN, and TR in 26.9.

item.title: Dev2026-04-21T15:00:00.000ZNew Events and Augments Head to the ArenaPrepare for a new season of glorious Arena combat that kicks off on Patch 26.09.
item.description: Dev2026-04-21T15:00:00.000ZNew Events and Augments Head to the ArenaPrepare for a new season of glorious Arena combat that kicks off on Patch 26.09.

item.title: Dev2026-04-14T18:00:00.000Z/dev: WASD’s Ranked ReleaseAfter months of testing and feedback, WASD is finally ready for primetime.
item.description: Dev2026-04-14T18:00:00.000Z/dev: WASD’s Ranked ReleaseAfter months of testing and feedback, WASD is finally ready for primetime.

item.title: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000ZTL;DW: Pandemonium, Arena & More Dev UpdateA short rundown of changes from today’s Dev Update.
item.description: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000ZTL;DW: Pandemonium, Arena & More Dev UpdateA short rundown of changes from today’s Dev Update.

item.title: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000ZDev Update: Arena Updates & MorePabro and Meddler talk about Season Two Pandemonium, gameplay changes, Arena updates, and more.
item.description: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000ZDev Update: Arena Updates & MorePabro and Meddler talk about Season Two Pandemonium, gameplay changes, Arena updates, and more.

item.title: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000Z/dev: Leveling Up ArenaA rundown of all the changes coming to Arena in Season 2.
item.description: Dev2026-04-14T17:00:00.000Z/dev: Leveling Up ArenaA rundown of all the changes coming to Arena in Season 2.
